printed.name: Stomach Massage Round Back
printed.setup: Sitting on carriage, legs bent, toes placed on footbar. feet in V position, hands placed on front edge of carriage. trunk in C curve position

movement.exhale: Straighten legs, dorsiflex feet, plantarflex feet
movement.inhale: Bend legs, return to start position

cues: Press hands against front of carriage
Straighten legs completely prior to dorsiflexion and plantarflexion
